sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Wait until the IT Support re-assign the Incident to the engineers
Assign engineer based on the Box
Set Operational Status to 'Retired'
Failure of the Incident marked
After Incident closure via 'Resolved by request' put additional info for the engineer in the work notes
Send an email to the Engineer assign to the targeted Box
Wait until engineer will close the Incident
Incident for detected Box
Set Operational Status to 'Operational'
Success of the Incident marked

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: After Incident closure via 'Resolved by request' put additional info for the engineer in the work notes
Set Operational Status to 'Operational'
Wait until engineer will close the Incident
Set Operational Status to 'Retired'
Wait until the IT Support re-assign the Incident to the engineers
Assign engineer based on the Box
Failure of the Incident marked
Success of the Incident marked
Incident for detected Box
Send an email to the Engineer assign to the targeted Box
